ai_summary: **Executive Summary:**  Ramco Industries Limited shareholders have approved the re-appointment of Shri Ajay Bhaskar Baliga as a Non-Executive Independent Director for a second five-year term, effective July 27, 2026, through a special resolution passed via postal ballot. This routine corporate governance action ensures continuity of independent oversight on the board by an experienced professional with extensive background in the Alcobev industry and other board memberships, with no apparent red flags identified.
